description: Scoring policy for prioritizing stale leads with the highest recovery potential.

action_rules.P1: Send direct personalized follow-up within 24 hours.
action_rules.P2: Review notes and send tailored reactivation this week.

message_angles.value_reactivation: Reopen the conversation around business value and unresolved goals.
message_angles.proposal_nudge: Follow up on the previously discussed proposal and remove friction.
message_angles.qualified_revival: Reference prior fit signals and invite a simple next step.
message_angles.data_gap_review: Request missing information before active recovery.
